ItacPersonItem.Notes: Joined the Ricovrati in 1661. He wrote: Per l`historia della serenissima Republica Veneta scritta dall`illustriss. & eccellentiss. sig. Battista Nani ... Oda di Michel`Angelo Angelico, academico olimpico e fra` Ricovrati l`Avvalorato (Possibly printed in Vicenza in 1662), not in British Library collections
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
